'''Kutag''', also known as '''Doornik-881''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] factory farm [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was maintained by [[Droid/Legends|droids]].<ref name="CTD" /> It was in the [[Doornik-881 system]] in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. Its inhabitants were killed in the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]] by the [[Yevetha]], who took over the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
